# Training Types

| Type | Purpose | RPE | Frequency |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Quality** (threshold / VO₂ max / fartlek) | Build aerobic capacity & race fitness | 7–9/10 | 1–2×/week |
| **Easy** | Aerobic base, recovery, volume | 4–5/10 | Daily OK |
| **Long run** | Endurance & marathon-specific adaptation | 5–6/10 | 1×/week (Sat) |

- Quality sessions require 48–72 h recovery between them.
- Long run progresses to 30–40 km peak depending on phase and experience.
